channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-92] Missing files in dist tarball
item.description: As has been discovered in changeset 255, we are missing some files in the dist tarball. The problem this causes of course is that if one tries to apply a patch to source unpacked from the tarball that wants to patch any of those missing files the patching fails. Changeset 257 has a patch to fix this.

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:
Integrated in lustre-dev » x86_64,client,el6,inkernel #340
LU-92 files and dirs missing in dist tarball (Revision 6eec76a7d8a181fa95daa5781be282bc27cae4c9)

Result = SUCCESS
Oleg Drokin : 6eec76a7d8a181fa95daa5781be282bc27cae4c9
Files :

  • lustre/autoconf/lustre-core.m4
  • lustre/include/Makefile.am
  • lustre/include/darwin/Makefile.am
